rulings.Case Title: CARMEN ALICEA VS. ANTONIO DOMINGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2016, line 4 DEFENDANT ANTONIO DOMINGUEZ'S Motion For Order To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment GRANTED. Plaintiff breached paragraphs 4 and 15 of the agreement. Defendant shall recover $4,300 per paragraph 4, $600 per paragraph 15, $500 in attorney's fees and $60 in costs per paragraph 4. = (501/REQ)
